aesthetic: Aurora — dark neon, characterful grotesque, green pulse in the dark
principles: Green is light, not color — use for glow effects
Dark gray #121212 (not pure black) — has warmth
Cards with green outer glow: rgba(29,185,84,0.12)
Podcast host tone: enthusiastic, direct, short-sentence rhythm
promptGuide: Apply the Aurora aesthetic: Bricolage Grotesque weight 700-800 display (quirky angles on g/a/e), Plus Jakarta Sans weight 400 body, bg #121212 (not pure black), text #ffffff, green #1ed760 for play/CTA/active states only (functional, not decorative), cards with green glow shadow rgba(29,185,84,0.12), 16px border-radius, uppercase button labels + letter-spacing 1.4-2px, podcast tone: casual ('honestly', 'guess what'), green highlights for growth numbers, emoji allowed (≤1 per page, data-related only).
